image_headline: NO FEDERAL HISTORY? YOU STILL QUALIFY.
image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'THE MYTH' with red X icon, three short myth labels: 'FEDERAL WINS REQUIRED', 'NO COMMERCIAL CREDIT', 'CLOSED TO NEWBIES'. Right panel white/light, bold label 'THE REALITY' with green checkmarks, three short reality labels: 'COMMERCIAL COUNTS', '2 YEARS ENOUGH', 'OPEN TO ALL'. Center: illustrated professional woman in suit stepping from dark navy panel into white panel. Bold headline at top: 'NO FEDERAL HISTORY? YOU STILL QUALIFY.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
